top_signals.title: U.S. informs Japan of Tomahawk missile delivery delays: report
top_signals.summary: The Japanese government has signed a contract with the U.S. government to acquire up to 400 Tomahawk missiles between fiscal 2025 and fiscal 2027.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
